texto: Another thing I like to do is sit back and take in nature. To look at the birds, listen to their singing, go hiking, camping and jogging and running, walking along the beach, playing games and sometimes being alone with the great outdoors. It's very special to me.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Larry Wilcox: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Another thing I like to do is sit back and take in nature. To look at the birds, listen to their …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, great, alone pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de alone e beach.
